heading: Expenses incurred in connection with leave canceled due to contingency operations: reimbursement
label: 709a Expenses incurred in connection with leave canceled due to contingency operations: reimbursement

children.text: the leave is canceled in connection with the member’s participation in a contingency operation; and
the cancellation occurs within 48 hours of the time the leave would have commenced.

children.heading: .—Regulations
children.label: b .—Regulations
children.text: The Secretary of Defense and, in the case of the Coast Guard when it is not operating as a service in the Navy, the Secretary of Homeland Security shall prescribe regulations to establish the criteria for the applicability of subsection (a).

children.heading: .—Conclusiveness of Settlement
children.label: c .—Conclusiveness of Settlement
children.text: The settlement of an application for reimbursement under subsection (a) is final and conclusive.
